notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Sal Stewart challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Matt McLain steals (5) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Will Benson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Benson homers (1) on a fly ball to right center field. Tyler Stephenson scores.

notableEvents.label: Jordan Beck GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Beck grounds into a double play, third baseman Ke'Bryan Hayes to second baseman Matt McLain to first baseman Sal Stewart. Ezequiel Tovar out at 2nd. Jordan Beck out at 1st.
